name: Star Diamond Corporation
summary: Star Diamond Corporation, a natural resource company, engages in the exploration, development, and production of diamonds in Canada. It holds 100% interest in the Star-Orion South Diamond project that is located in the Fort √É¬† la Corne area of central Saskatchewan; and 33% interest in the Buffalo Hills property located in central Alberta. The company was formerly known as Shore Gold Inc. and changed its name to Star Diamond Corporation in February 2018. Star Diamond Corporation was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Saskatoon, Canada.
